title: cgraph adapter result
description: Normalized result shape returned by btrain's cgraph_adapter for every command invocation. Wraps the cgraph JSON envelope with adapter-level metadata (timeout, availability, stderr).

ok.description: True when the cgraph command exited 0 and returned ok=true in its envelope.

kind.description: cgraph command name that was invoked (e.g. 'review_packet', 'audit', 'blast_radius', 'manifest').

payload.description: Parsed JSON output from the cgraph command. Null when unavailable or timed_out.

timed_out.description: True when the command exceeded the adapter timeout budget.

unavailable.description: True when the cgraph binary was not found, manifest probe failed, or the command is not supported by the installed version.

stderr_summary.description: First 500 chars of stderr for diagnostics. Empty on clean runs.

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock milliseconds from subprocess spawn to result.

source.description: Whether the result came from kkg serve or a direct CLI subprocess.
